## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a feed, a calculation, or the UI)
- [ ] New feature / panel / data source
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies were added
- [ ] No secrets, real KV ids, or personal data were committed
- [ ] Any new/changed feed degrades gracefully (never blanks a card or throws)
- [ ] The README still accurately describes what the dashboard shows
